title.en: NTEK Test Report Updated For Building Toy Series
title.zh: 创意拼搭玩具系列 NTEK 测试报告更新完成

excerpt.en: The latest NTEK test report is ready for sample confirmation, buyer filing, and routine quality communication.
excerpt.zh: 最新 NTEK 测试报告已整理完成，可用于样品确认、客户归档和日常品质沟通。

body.en:
The NTEK test report for the creative building toy series has been updated and organized for sample confirmation, buyer filing, and project communication.

For overseas customers, clear test documentation has a direct effect on internal approval speed. A stable report version reduces repeated confirmation across sourcing, quality, and compliance teams.

The report version matches current samples

The updated file is aligned with the current creative building toy series, making it easier for customers to review material, structure, and launch readiness using the same version.

When several roles review the project, one shared file reduces misunderstanding and makes answers more accurate.

Filing and approval take less time

Sourcing teams often need to pass test reports to category, compliance, or retail-channel reviewers. Preparing the file in advance reduces last-minute document requests.

It also supports production communication

The report is not only useful at the sample stage. It can also support production planning, shipment preparation, and repeat-order discussion when customers ask again about scope or file status.

The Test Report Should Match The Current Product Version

After the NTEK report update, customers can review samples, files, and internal approval under one version. For the fort building series, piece count, material description, sample photos, and report scope need to match.

Review These Points During Buyer Approval

Check pointReviewPractical use
Sample versionProduct name, piece count, material, colorAvoids using the wrong report or old version
Target marketU.S., EU, or customer-specified marketHelps judge ASTM F963, EN71, or other file needs
Packaging filesLabels, warnings, instructions, tracking informationReduces late document requests before shipment

Use The Report As A Project File

For qualification files, test reports, supplier audits, or export documents, review compliance information, match the file with the right SKU through products, and send the document list through the contact page.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
创意拼搭玩具系列的 NTEK 测试报告已完成更新，相关资料可用于样品确认、客户归档和项目沟通。

对海外客户来说，测试资料是否清晰，会直接影响内部审批效率。稳定的报告版本能减少业务、品质和采购之间反复确认。

报告版本与当前样品对齐

更新后的文件已与当前创意拼搭玩具系列资料对齐，便于客户在评估材料、结构和上市准备时使用同一版本。

当项目涉及多个角色审核时，统一文件能减少误读，也能让问题回复更准确。

归档和审批更省时间

项目团队通常需要把测试报告转交给品类、合规或零售渠道审核。资料提前整理好，可以减少临时补文件的情况。

也服务后续量产沟通

报告不仅用于样品阶段，也可以在量产计划、出货准备和复购沟通中作为参考。客户再次询问测试范围或文件状态时，团队能基于同一版本回复。

测试报告要和当前产品版本对应

NTEK 测试报告更新后，客户更容易把样品、文件和内部审核放在同一版本下确认。对堡垒拼搭系列来说，件数、材料描述、样品照片和报告范围需要保持一致。

客户审核时可以重点核对

核对项建议查看实际作用
样品版本产品名称、件数、材料、颜色避免用错报告或旧版本
目标市场美国、欧盟或客户指定市场判断是否需要 ASTM F963、EN71 等资料
包装资料标签、警示语、说明书、追溯信息减少临近出货时补文件

把报告作为项目推进资料使用

如需进一步确认资质、测试报告、供应商审核或出口文件，可先查看 资质合规页面，再结合 产品中心 选择对应 SKU，并通过 联系页面 提交文件清单。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
